emails.subject: Re: Interconnection benefits
emails.body: Re: Interconnection benefits Yes, I think that we discussed this. This is the KEY slide to combat Balkanization. I'm working with Alan and Steve Walton on it. Can you please check with Alan to see if Jennifer has completed, or will complete, the analysis soon? Thanks. Best, Jeff
